$comment: SD-LEO-INFRA-RESILIENCE-REVIEW-SPECIAL-001 (FR-2). Allowlist for the weekly off-DB logical dump of IRREPLACEABLE governance state. Criterion: rows whose only copy lives in the shared Supabase project (dedlbzhpgkmetvhbkyzq) and which cannot be regenerated from git, CI, or other tables. Audit/trace/metric tiers are deliberately excluded (derivable or historical-only, ~4 GB of the 5.7 GB database). Sizes/row counts from the 2026-06-10 resilience review.
restore_path: Each .ndjson line is to_jsonb(row). Restore = re-insert via jsonb_populate_record(NULL::target_table, line::jsonb) — the exact path proven by npm run dr:rehearse (drill A).

tables.rationale: Core governance state machine — every SD, status, metadata. Sole copy. ~3,733 rows / 33 MB.
All PRDs — planning artifacts gates validate against. Sole copy. ~2,973 rows / 52 MB.
Canonical phase-transition record; without it no session can determine what was approved/completed. ~24,478 rows / 126 MB.
Institutional learning corpus feeding /learn and pattern mining. Irreproducible. ~5,675 rows / 61 MB.
Durable feedback channel (incl. harness_backlog + completion flags routing). Sole copy. ~2,095 rows / 4 MB.
Mined recurrence patterns (PAT-AUTO-*) driving gate auto-resolution. Expensive to re-mine, source retros may age out. ~1,333 rows / 6 MB.
Story state consumed by USER_STORY_COVERAGE and story gates. Sole copy. ~10,400 rows / 26 MB.
Backlog items per SD (GATE-1 requires >=1); hand-authored content. ~134 rows.
Protocol version registry — the active-protocol pointer CLAUDE.md generation keys on. Tiny, critical.
THE protocol source of truth (262 sections). Generated CLAUDE_*.md in git is a stale partial mirror, not a substitute.
Flag registry with lifecycle CHECK invariants; flags gate live behavior (TWOWAY_V2 etc.). Hand-curated. ~18 rows.
Sub-agent registry (personas, triggers, activation). Hand-curated config the gate pipeline reads. ~31 rows.
Canonical vision estate (L1 identity doc + L2 specs incl. byte-exact restore addendums). Chairman-locked content. ~275 rows.
Repo registry (local_path used by SUB_AGENT_REPO_RESOLUTION gate). Tiny hand-curated config. ~11 rows.

excluded.reason: 3,366 MB historical table-change audit; derivable-tier, dominates DB size, low restore value.
Trace spans — observability history, regenerated by operation. Already covered by retention_archive.
Gate validation history; derivable from re-running gates.
116 MB of handoff evidence rows — audit-class, time-keyed, only needed for in-flight SDs; completed-SD evidence is summarized in retrospectives/handoffs.
362 MB in-DB cold archive of the audit tier — archiving the archive would defeat the size budget; its restore path is proven by dr:rehearse instead.
Purge-undo snapshots with explicit drop-eligible dates; transient by design.
